basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) Research Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website sgpgims.org.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SGPGIMS Research Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Physical handicapped and women candidate.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in the research area of stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, molecular biology or having 3 years of research experience after postgraduation (MSc.) and at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in the research area of stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, molecular biology or having 3 years of research experience after postgraduation (MSc.) and at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download SGPGIMS Research Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download SGPGIMS Research Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SGPGIMS Research Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SGPGIMS Research Associate I position is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, or molecular biology. Alternatively, 3 years of research experience after MSc with at least one research paper in a Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate I position is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/Physical handicapped and women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for SGPGIMS Research Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be done for the Research Associate I post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate I position will be based on an interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode, allowing for both online and offline participation.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate I position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Research Associate I post will receive a fixed monthly salary of Rs. 69,600 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job for the Research Associate I position at SGPGIMS is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Research Associate I position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. You should prepare your application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the application?
faq.answer: You will need to attach self-attested copies of your educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.

faq.question: Q10. Where is SGPGIMS located?
faq.answer: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226014.
